task_completion.description: Access the Event Rules configuration interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Event Rules' dialog in the Nx Witness Client is open, or a terminal/API client is preparing a request to the /rest/v1/rules endpoint.

task_completion.description: Set the event type to Camera Disconnect.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Event' field is set to 'Camera Disconnect' in the GUI, or '"eventType": "cameraDisconnectEvent"' is visible in the API payload.

task_completion.description: Set the action type to Show Desktop Notification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Action' field is set to 'Show Desktop Notification' (or similar) in the GUI, or '"actionType": "showPopupAction"' is visible in the API payload.

task_completion.description: Apply the rule to all cameras.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The source/camera selection shows 'Any camera' or 'All cameras' in the GUI, or '"eventResourceIds": []' (empty array or omitted) is visible in the API payload.

task_completion.description: Set the comment to 'Camera Offline Alert'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Camera Offline Alert' is entered in the comment or description field in the GUI, or '"comment": "Camera Offline Alert"' is visible in the API payload.

task_completion.description: Ensure the rule is enabled and save it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enabled' checkbox is checked and the user clicks 'Apply' or 'OK' in the GUI, or a successful HTTP response is shown after sending the API request.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Nx Witness software or API.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the Nx Witness Client, Web Admin, or a legitimate terminal/API tool executing the request.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just mock up the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not just displaying the expected values in a text editor or echo command without interacting with the VMS.

integrity.description: Verify the rule configuration was actually applied or saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks Apply/OK in the GUI, or executes the API request and receives a success response, rather than just filling out the form and stopping.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The rule must use event type 'cameraDisconnectEvent' and action type 'showPopupAction'. It must apply to all cameras (empty eventResourceIds in API or 'Any camera' in GUI), have the exact comment 'Camera Offline Alert', and be enabled. If created via API, the endpoint is https://localhost:7001/rest/v1/rules.
